title: spiraea × multiflora
intro: Spiraea × multiflora, also known as Rose Mayflower or Bridal Wreath, is a hybrid flowering plant species that belongs to the Spiraea genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Spiraea × multiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves, stems, and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
